productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Kids Boys Navy Blue T-shirt
description: Composition Navy blue polo T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a ribbed spread collar, a ruched half buttoned placket, branding on the left chest, short sleeves with ribbed cuffs and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergent Do not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron do not iron directly on print/embroidery This united colors of benetton T-shirt is designed to make your little bundle of mischief look cute, while he stays comfortable all day in the soft cotton fabric. Pair it with a denim pants and floaters for unbridled comfort.
